summary: Remediated the verifier-reported MM-1170 gaps by adding persisted Provider Profile tier policy fields, exposing them through provider-profile CRUD and manager sync payloads, and adding the missing focused coverage for provider-profile tier round trips, strict API fallback rejection, and independent model-only / effort-only task override semantics. Scope was bounded to the verifier remainingWork backlog; no pull request was created and Jira status was not changed.

gap_statuses.requirement: Add model_tiers JSON and default_model_tier integer to ManagedAgentProviderProfile with validation/defaults aligned to docs/Security/ProviderProfileModelEffortTiers.md.
evidence: api_service/db/models.py adds non-null model_tiers JSON with the documented Runtime default tier and default_model_tier integer defaulting to 1.
api_service/api/routers/provider_profiles.py validates model_tiers as a non-empty list of mappings and default_model_tier as an integer within range.

gap_statuses.requirement: Add an Alembic migration for model_tiers/default_model_tier with safe defaults for existing profiles.
evidence: api_service/migrations/versions/335_provider_profile_model_tiers.py adds model_tiers and default_model_tier to managed_agent_provider_profiles with safe non-null server defaults and the positive default tier check.

gap_statuses.requirement: Extend provider profile create/update/read schemas and _row_to_dict to accept and return tier policy fields, including validation that model_tiers is a non-empty list of mappings and default_model_tier is within range.
evidence: ProviderProfileCreate, ProviderProfileUpdate, and ProviderProfileResponse now include model_tiers/default_model_tier.
create_profile persists the fields; update_profile validates row-level tier policy after partial updates; _row_to_dict returns the fields.
tests/unit/api_service/api/routers/test_provider_profiles.py covers create response, get/update round trip, DB readback, and out-of-range default_model_tier rejection.

gap_statuses.requirement: Ensure provider profile manager/list/service surfaces preserve model_tiers/default_model_tier so runtime resolution sees real selected profile policy, not only test-double attributes.
evidence: moonmind/workflows/temporal/workflows/provider_profile_manager.py stores and returns model_tiers/default_model_tier in ProfileSlotState, restore, and sync paths.

gap_statuses.requirement: Add API strict fallback rejection coverage.
evidence: tests/unit/api/routers/test_executions.py adds test_create_task_shaped_execution_rejects_strict_unavailable_model_tier, asserting tierFallback strict with out-of-range modelTier rejects before create_execution is called.

gap_statuses.requirement: Add model-only and effort-only override tests if the intended override semantics require independent bypass behavior.
evidence: tests/unit/workflows/executions/test_model_resolver.py adds independent model-only and effort-only override tests showing the supplied override bypasses tier policy and records task_override for the overridden field.

gap_statuses.requirement: Run targeted provider profile API/unit tests after adding schema support.
evidence: Focused pytest and ./tools/test_unit.sh targeted runs passed for tests/unit/api_service/api/routers/test_provider_profiles.py.

gap_statuses.requirement: Run the model resolver and execution router unit tests again after persistence/API wiring changes.
Run hermetic integration only if the migration/schema change triggers the repo's integration selector for DB migrations.
evidence: ./tools/test_integration.sh was attempted because this remediation adds an Alembic migration.
The command failed before running tests while building the Docker pytest image: Docker reported 'the --mount option requires BuildKit' and compose warned that the buildx plugin is not installed.
Retrying with DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 failed with the same BuildKit/buildx environment error before test execution.

targeted_checks.notes: 46 passed; warnings were existing FastAPI TestClient/httpx deprecation and google.generativeai package deprecation warnings.
Python segment passed 453 tests; Vitest segment passed 60 files with 942 tests passed and 238 skipped. The wrapper emitted existing jsdom canvas warnings during UI tests.

Failed before tests while building the Docker pytest image because BuildKit support was unavailable: Docker reported 'the --mount option requires BuildKit'; compose also warned the buildx plugin is not installed.
Retry failed before tests for the same BuildKit/buildx environment issue.

environment_notes.detail: The latest MM-1170 moonspec-verify result was found at /work/agent_jobs/mm:3a4d0574-3f55-438b-8861-be2e0a37020f/artifacts/jira-implement-verify.json. Repo-local reports/remediation_verification-1.json referred to MM-1146 and was not used as authority.
Hermetic integration was attempted due to the migration/schema change, but the runtime Docker environment lacks working BuildKit/buildx support for the integration image build.
